zh.lifeSummary: 當Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech於1340年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾時，他的父親Levan Ap David Dda30歲，母親Eva verch Einion26歲。他於1374年與Lady Alys Verch  Leuan在威爾士結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1416年享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech于1340年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾时，他的父亲Levan Ap David Dda30岁，母亲Eva verch Einion26岁。他于1374年与Lady Alys Verch  Leuan在威尔士结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1416年享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech was born in 1340, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Levan Ap David Dda, was 30 and his mother, Eva verch Einion, was 26. He married Lady Alys Verch  Leuan in 1374, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died in 1416, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech est né en 1340, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Levan Ap David Dda, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Eva verch Einion, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alys Verch  Leuan en 1374, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé en 1416, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech 1340 in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Levan Ap David Dda 30 und seine Mutter Eva verch Einion 26. Er hat 1374 in Wales Lady Alys Verch  Leuan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb 1416 im Alter von 76 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech è nato il nel 1340 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Levan Ap David Dda, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Eva verch Einion, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alys Verch  Leuan nel 1374, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1416, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllechが1340年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Levan Ap David Ddaは30歳，母Eva verch Einionは26歳であった。1374年にウェールズでLady Alys Verch  Leuanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1416年に76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech(이)가 1340년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Levan Ap David Dda(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva verch Einion(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1374년 웨일스에서 Lady Alys Verch  Leuan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1416년 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Cymydmaen, Caernarvonshire, Wales, Unite: Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech nasceu em 1340, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Levan Ap David Dda, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Eva verch Einion, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alys Verch  Leuan em 1374, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1416, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech родился в 1340 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Levan Ap David Dda было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva verch Einion, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alys Verch  Leuan в 1374 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер в 1416 г. в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech nació en 1340, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Levan Ap David Dda, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Eva verch Einion, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Alys Verch  Leuan en 1374, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1416, a la edad de 76 años.
